name: com.ezg.supabase
description: Supabase C# client for Unity, vendored as a self-contained DLL bundle (Supabase, GoTrue auth, PostgREST, Realtime, Storage, Functions) plus its transitive dependencies (Websocket.Client, System.Reactive, JWTDecoder, MimeMapping, System.Threading.*). No first-party source — the assemblies are the original NuGet builds (netstandard2.0). PEER REQUIREMENT: the consuming project must provide Newtonsoft.Json 13.x (e.g. com.unity.nuget.newtonsoft-json) — it is NOT bundled. See README for the full peer list and IL2CPP notes.
